name: DOCUSIGN, INC.
summary: DocuSign, Inc. provides agreement management solutions including its Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM) platform, the world's leading e-signature solution, and contract lifecycle management (CLM). As of January 31, 2026, over 1.8 million customers and more than a billion users utilize DocuSign globally. The company offers subscription-based products with over 1,100 active partner integrations, serving businesses from VSBs to global enterprises across virtually all industries.

products.name: Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM) Platform
products.description: System of record enabling customers to ingest agreements, build workflows at scale, and act on AI-powered insights from agreement data.

products.name: eSignature
products.description: World's leading electronic signature solution, available as standalone or core IAM capability, with 99.9%+ availability worldwide.

products.name: Contract Lifecycle Management (CLM)
products.description: Solution for managing contract workflows and lifecycle, enhanced with AI-powered capabilities through the IAM platform.

products.name: Docusign Navigator
products.description: AI-powered agreement repository helping customers manage agreements and identify insights.

products.name: Docusign Maestro
products.description: No-code workflow builder that helps customers accelerate agreement processes.

products.name: Agreement Desk
products.description: AI-powered tool for streamlining agreement creation and management.

products.name: AI-Assisted Review
products.description: AI-powered tool for streamlining agreement review processes.

products.name: Docusign Iris
products.description: AI engine powering the IAM platform with proprietary large-scale data advantages.

products.name: Docusign App Center
products.description: Marketplace for partner-built apps and integrations extending IAM platform capabilities.

partnerships.description: Over 1,100 active partner integrations allowing customers to create, commit, and manage agreements within existing applications.
